---
title: ""
description-meta: "Personal Website - Ömer Sümer"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
            #quarto-content {
              display: block !important;
            }

            #quarto-document-content {
              max-width: 800px !important;
              margin: 0 auto !important;
              text-align: left;
              padding: 4em 1.5rem 1rem;
            }

            h1.hero-title {
              font-size: 2.2rem;
              font-weight: 600;
              letter-spacing: -0.5px;
              color: #222;
              margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
            }

            p.tagline {
              font-size: 1.15rem;
              color: #555;
              margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
              font-style: italic;
            }

            .social-links {
              margin-top: 2rem;
              font-size: 1.1rem;
            }

            .social-links a {
              color: #2a6496;
              text-decoration: none;
              transition: color 0.2s ease;
            }

            .social-links a:hover {
              color: #1a1a1a;
              text-decoration: underline;
            }

            .social-links .sep {
              color: #bbb;
              margin: 0 0.3rem;
            }

            @media (max-width: 576px) {
              #quarto-document-content { padding: 2.5rem 1rem; }
              h1.hero-title { font-size: 2rem; }
              p.tagline { font-size: 1rem; margin-bottom: 2rem; }
              nav.socials { gap: 0.8rem; }
            }
          </style>
---

```{=html}
<div>
  <h1 class="hero-title">Ömer Sümer</h1>
  <p class="tagline">AI/ML Engineer • Computer Vision • NLP/LLMs</p>
</div>


<div style="font-size: 1.1rem; line-height: 1.8;">
<p>Hi! I'm an AI/ML researcher and engineer with academic experience in applied computer vision and language processing.</p>
<p>Here you'll find <a href="posts.html#category=blog">what I'm learning & building</a>, and <a href="posts.html#category=opinion">thinking about beyond tech, my short articles</a>, anything that draws my interest, literature, cinema, photography, mountains and so on. Always happy to connect over coffee, reach out anytime!</p>
</div>

<nav class="social-links" aria-label="Social media links">
  <a href="mailto:suemer.oemer@outlook.com" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> E-mail</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="https://github.com/sumeromer" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/omer-sumer" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=h5sbUygAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-google"></i> Scholar</a>
  <span class="sep">·</span>
  <a href="https://www.youtube.com" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-youtube"></i> YouTube</a>
</nav>
```
